name: _advprec_topk_boundary
note: Red-team class-2 (sort/topk) entry for precision_verification.md. kernel.py is an intentionally flawed per-block-quota approximate top-k: recall~1.0 on benign torch.randn (a benign-only recheck ACCEPTS it) but recall collapses with a large value-gap on a concentrated distribution (winners in one block). Demonstrates distribution-dependent false accept. Yardstick: tests/advprec_topk_demo.py. Classifier (verifier/classify.py) labels it select -> J2.

adversarial.note: value-gap weighted; index recall is reported but NOT the verdict
